category_sources: source_facts.description says "Better configuration for less"; official site describes Nickel as managing complex configurations and the repository calls it a universal configuration language.
display_name_sources: Official website title and repository README use Nickel; source_facts.name is nickel.
docs_sources: Official website has Documentation and Standard Library navigation; /user-manual/ redirects to the official user manual introduction.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/tweag/nickel, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official site describes configuration reuse, opt-in static typing, and contracts; official repository describes gradual typing and contract-based validation.
